info.title: OtelEvents.Cli
info.description: CLI tool for otel-events schema validation, code generation, version comparison, and documentation

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: otel-events Schema CLI — validate, generate, and diff .otel.yaml schema files

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to .otel.yaml schema file to validate

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate C# source files from an .otel.yaml schema

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for generated C# files

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Compare two schema versions and detect breaking changes

arguments.name: old
arguments.description: Path to the old (baseline) .otel.yaml schema file

arguments.name: new
arguments.description: Path to the new .otel.yaml schema file
